SEARCH
Package fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.repository

Interface UserRepositoryInterface

All Known Implementing Classes:
UserRepositoryMariadb
public interface UserRepositoryInterface
Declares user persistence operations for the Repository layer. Implementations provide MariaDB data access for user entities.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    createUser(User user)
    Persists a new user in storage.
    boolean
    deleteUser(String id)
    Deletes a user from storage by identifier.
    List<User>
    getAllUsers()
    Retrieves all users from persistence storage.
    User
    getUserById(String id)
    Retrieves one user by identifier.
    boolean
    updateUser(String id, User user)
    Updates an existing user in storage.

  • Method Details

    • getAllUsers

      List<User> getAllUsers()
      Retrieves all users from persistence storage.
      Returns:
      list of all persisted users

    • getUserById

      User getUserById(String id)
      Retrieves one user by identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - identifier of the user to retrieve
      Returns:
      matching user instance, or null when not found

    • createUser

      boolean createUser(User user)
      Persists a new user in storage.
      Parameters:
      user - user entity to create
      Returns:
      true when insertion succeeds, otherwise false

    • updateUser

      boolean updateUser(String id, User user)
      Updates an existing user in storage.
      Parameters:
      id - identifier of the user to update
      user - source data used for the update
      Returns:
      true when update succeeds, otherwise false

    • deleteUser

      boolean deleteUser(String id)
      Deletes a user from storage by identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - identifier of the user to delete
      Returns:
      true when deletion succeeds, otherwise false
